message:
feat(observability): add 'Explain Why' diagnostics module

Implement intelligent troubleshooting engine for runtime issues:
- explain_region_open(): diagnose why regions cannot close
- explain_task_blocked(): identify task blocking causes
- find_leaked_obligations(): detect orphaned obligations

Provides human-readable explanations with deterministic output
and actionable recommendations. Integrates with Console for
rich rendering when available.

Closes bd-qctz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
